initial_catalog.name: sound_quality
initial_catalog.description: The audio performance and clarity of the device.
examples: The sound quality is very good

initial_catalog.name: accessibility
initial_catalog.description: How well the product accommodates users with specific needs.

initial_catalog.name: warranty_validation
initial_catalog.description: The ability to verify the authenticity and coverage of the product warranty.
examples: I will encourage you to call apple and confirm your applecare warranty
called Apple, was told this is a 2nd generation device which is great and so my product is real

initial_catalog.name: battery_life
initial_catalog.description: The duration the device can operate on a single charge.
examples: I'm not impressed with the 5 hour battery on one full charge
The battery life is about 3 hours of continuous use

initial_catalog.name: ergonomics
initial_catalog.description: The physical design and comfort of the device.
